_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin knockdown in human Schwann cells: clues to vestibular schwannoma tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: Schwann cell proliferation was assessed on day 8 following merlin-targeted siRNA transfection and controls, using the BrdU assay, and merlin depletion conferred an increased proliferation rate
resourceName: Human Schwann cells (HSC; ScienCell, Carlsbad, CA)
details: Merlin depletion conferred an increased proliferation rate as assessed by BrdU assay on day 8
